title: Surgeon Vacancy at Granules India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Granules India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
